mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT USER_ID AS userId ,USER_NM AS userNm ,DUTY_NM AS dutyNm ,DEPT_NM AS deptNm ,EMAIL AS email ,ROLE_ID AS roleId ,USER_PWD AS userPwd , @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBUSERBS WHERE 1=1
AND USER_ID like CONCAT('%',#{userId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND USER_NM like CONCAT('%',#{userNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DUTY_NM like CONCAT('%',#{dutyNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DEPT_NM like CONCAT('%',#{deptNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND EMAIL like CONCAT('%',#{email, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ROLE_ID like CONCAT('%',#{roleId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND USER_PWD like CONCAT('%',#{userPwd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by USER_ID ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r where p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) and p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBUSERBS WHERE 1=1
AND USER_ID like CONCAT('%',#{userId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND USER_NM like CONCAT('%',#{userNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DUTY_NM like CONCAT('%',#{dutyNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DEPT_NM like CONCAT('%',#{deptNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND EMAIL like CONCAT('%',#{email, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ROLE_ID like CONCAT('%',#{roleId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND USER_PWD like CONCAT('%',#{userPwd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
SELECT USER_ID AS userId ,USER_NM AS userNm ,DUTY_NM AS dutyNm ,DEPT_NM AS deptNm ,EMAIL AS email ,ROLE_ID AS roleId ,USER_PWD AS userPwd FROM TBUSERBS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBUSERBS SET USER_NM = #{userNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, EMAIL = #{email, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, DUTY_NM = #{dutyNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, DEPT_NM = #{deptNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, ROLE_ID = #{roleId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, USER_PWD = #{userPwd, jdbcType = VARCHAR} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM TBUSERBS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
